events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** — the placed bar size/deformation pattern doesn't match the schedule on the placing drawings, which reduces the provided reinforcement area and fails ACI 318/ACI 117 requirements. Since it was caught at the inspection hold point before concrete placement, the required path is hold the pour, get EOR evaluation, replace non-conforming bars, and re-inspect before release.
